title: Phase 0: Permissions, approvals, and event backbone docs
description: Create PERMISSIONS-MATRIX.md with all permissions x roles x scopes. Create APPROVAL-POLICIES.md with approval workflows. Create EVENT-BACKBONE.md with all event types, producers, and consumers.
steps: Write docs/PERMISSIONS-MATRIX.md with complete role-permission matrix
Define all permission types, scopes (company, branch, own), and role mappings
Write docs/APPROVAL-POLICIES.md with approval workflows for credit holds, price overrides, PO approvals, etc.
Write docs/EVENT-BACKBONE.md with all event types categorized by module
Document event producers, consumers, and side effects for each event type
